name: Silence Corner Atoll S Rotating Camera Collar for Select Sony Mirrorless Cameras
description: The Atoll S Rotating Camera Collar from Silence Corner is a rotating collar that attaches to a camera body to allow quick rotation from portrait to landscape orientation.

features.Key Features:: For Select Sony Mirrorless Cameras | Rotate Camera from Portrait to Landscape | Click Points at 0-, 90-, and 180° | Interior Mount Diameter: 63.5mm | Arca Type Base with 1/4"-20 Socket | Tilting / Articulating Screen Compatible | Quickly Change Lenses | Aircraft-Grade Aluminum Construction
features.What’s in the box?: Silence Corner Atoll S Rotating Camera Collar for Select Sony Mirrorless Cameras (Black) | 4mm Hex Wrench | 3mm Hex Wrench | Spare Link Screw | Spare 1/4"-20 Screw | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
